description: Development tools for testing Stake behaviors. Use these actions to simulate different scenarios.

increaseMaturity.title: Increase maturity
increaseMaturity.description: Add maturity to this Stake for testing reward disbursement and auto-staking features.

unlockStake.title: Unlock Stake
unlockStake.description: Instantly unlock this Stake, bypassing the dissolve delay. The Stake will be ready for disbursement.

createProposals.title: Create proposals
createProposals.description: Generate sample proposals to test voting functionality and proposal rendering.
